js.category: [{"text":"最新发布","id":"/"},{"text":"网红黑料","id":"/category/whhl/"},{"text":"吃瓜视频","id":"/category/cgsp/"},{"text":"社会猛料","id":"/category/shml/"}]
js.home: async(p,c)=>{const u=c==='/'?`https://51sptv.com/page/${p}/`:`https://51sptv.com${c}page/${p}/`;const r=await fetch(u);const h=await r.text();const i=[];const g=/<article.*?post-card.*?>.*?href="(.*?)".*?title="(.*?)".*?data-src="(.*?)".*?<\/article>/gs;let m;while((m=g.exec(h))!==null){i.push({id:m[1],title:m[2],cover:m[3],remark:'点击播放'})}return i}
js.search: async(k,p)=>{const u=`https://51sptv.com/search/${encodeURIComponent(k)}/${p}/`;const r=await fetch(u);const h=await r.text();const i=[];const g=/<article.*?post-card.*?>.*?href="(.*?)".*?title="(.*?)".*?data-src="(.*?)".*?<\/article>/gs;let m;while((m=g.exec(h))!==null){i.push({id:m[1],title:m[2],cover:m[3]})}return i}
